name: hybrid-loops
description: Hybrid loops: a design pattern where LLM judgment and deterministic code alternate in a mutually-constraining cycle. Diagnostic skill plus three MCP servers for the recurring primitives.
author: Justin Stimatze
_note: Stub extension manifest for Gemini Code Assist / Gemini CLI. The skill content at skills/hybrid-loops/ is portable; adjust per Gemini's current extension spec. Issues/PRs welcome — see CROSS_AGENT.md.
